title: Hot wax cleaning device and system
abstract: A device for the mechanical removal of wax residues on vehicle bodies, characterized byâa wax absorbing tape (1), âa supply spindle (2) for storing and for unwinding unused wax absorbing tape (1), âa press-on unit (5) for pressing the wax absorbing tape (1) onto a wax-soiled surface of the body of the vehicle, andâone or more motors for transporting the wax absorbing tape (1) from the supply spindle (2) via the deflecting reels (4) to the take-up reel (3), andâa control unit for controlling the advance of the wax absorbing tape.
claims: 1. Device for the mechanical removal of wax residues from vehicle bodies, characterized by a wax absorbing tape ( 1 ), a supply reel ( 2 ) for stocking and unwinding of unused wax absorbing tape ( 1 ), a take-up reel ( 3 ) for used wax absorbing tape ( 1 ), deflection reels ( 4 ) for guiding the wax absorbing tape ( 1 ), a pressure unit ( 5 ) for pressing the wax absorbing tape ( 1 ) against a wax-contaminated surface of the body of a vehicle, as well as one or more motors for transporting the wax absorbing tape ( 1 ) from the supply reel ( 2 ) via the deflection reels ( 4 ) to the take-up reel ( 3 ), and a control unit for controlling the feed operation of the wax absorbing tape ( 1 ).
